title: Contaminated-site barrier — domain-decomposition (FBPINN) PINN
governing_equations: c_t = D(x)\,c_{xx} + f,\ D=D_{soil}\ \text{outside}\ [0.45,0.55],\ D_{barrier}=0.1\ \text{inside};\ c^*=(1-e^{-t})\,\Psi(x)
expected_band: plume slowed by the low-D barrier (kink in c at each face); relative-L2 ~2e-1 on the CPU 2-channel lane (the coefficient-jump kink is the hard part; the strict per-subdomain-normalized FBPINN + GPU tighten it)

variants.note_en: 10× low-D barrier in [0.45,0.55]: the plume is slowed and c develops a kink at each barrier face.
variants.note_es: Barrera de baja D (10×) en [0.45,0.55]: el plume se frena y c desarrolla un quiebre en cada cara.
